definition:
προσεδρεύω
 (πρόσεδρος, sitting near), [in LXX: 1Ma.11:40 * ;] 
  1. to sit near. 
   2. to attend regularly: with dative, 1Co.9:13, Rec. (see: παρεδρεύω).†
 παρ-εδρεύω 
 [in LXX: Pro.1:21 8:3 * ;] 
to sit constantly beside, attend constantly (cf. MM, xix): τ. θυσιαστηρίω, 1Co.9:13.†
 (AS)
